sections.purpose: Horizontal course card with left-half hero photo and right-half content (eyebrow caption, title, body, 2x2 feature tiles row, price, mint CTA, secondary caption).

image.alt: Group of students practicing yoga with a teacher guiding inversions

props.title: Decoding "What is Prana?"
props.description: Pay once. Access 25 expert-led video lessons at your own pace, forever. From beginner inversions to advanced flows.

components.notes: Outer rounded-rectangle (1:3979) provides the card surface with white background. Left rectangle (1:3980, 447x362) is the photo region. Right column starts at x=487 (40px gutter from image). Title at y=26, description at y=84, feature tiles row at y=160 (height 104), button at y=289, price at top-right (x=1194, y=26), secondary caption at bottom-right (x=1153, y=305).

props.icon: lucide or inline SVG (24-29px, brand green)
props.label: string (centered, below icon)

components.notes: Identical 110x104 rounded tiles, 15px horizontal gap. Icon vertically centered around y=21, label baseline ~y=65 inside tile. The English tile uses a packaged icon node (icon-park-solid:english) — likely a filled green badge with the letters 'En'.

241x44 pill-shaped CTA, mint fill, dark text. Likely maps to existing Button primitive in components/ui — codebase-scout to confirm. If no mint variant exists, extend Button with a `mint` variant rather than creating a new component.

uncertain.reason: The 'English' tile uses a packaged icon node 'icon-park-solid:english' which is itself a 29x29 frame — may contain a green rounded badge with 'En' text rather than a single vector. Builder should fetch its child SVGs or render an inline mint badge with 'En' label.

Caption 'Starts in 3 days' sits at bottom-right (x=1153, y=305) — visually it pairs with the CTA row but spatially aligns with the price column. Treating as a sibling of the button row; builder should place it bottom-right of the right column.
Feature tile row width is 485px (4 tiles x 110px + 3 gaps x 15px = 485) but the right column is 597px wide — tile row is left-aligned within the column, not full-width.
